title: Arise No More
description: Adds a new element of unpredictability to the game by introducing a chance of death every time you wake up
body:
[Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/arise-no-more/versions?l=fabric) requires: [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).  
[Quilt](https://modrinth.com/mod/arise-no-more/versions?l=quilt) requires: [QFAPI and QSL](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl).  
[Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/arise-no-more/versions?l=forge) version is also available.  

**This mod is not required on the client!**

<details>

<summary>
Funposting

</summary>

*Introducing Arise No More, the ultimate mod for Minecraft players looking for a new level of challenge and immersion. With this mod, you'll never know what's going to happen when you wake up, as I've added a new layer of unpredictability to the game through my implementation of a death probability system upon waking up. This mod uses the latest in modding technology, including event bus integration and random number generation, to bring a fresh and exciting experience to your game.*

*The mod is designed to provide an added layer of risk to the game, ramping up the danger and excitement when skipping a night. Players must constantly test their luck and skills against the odds, and they will never know when death may strike. Arise No More pushes the boundaries of what is possible in Minecraft modding, and it's a must-have for players looking for a new level of gameplay. With its unique and innovative features, Arise No More is sure to change the way you play Minecraft.*

</details>

With that being said, this mod simply makes it so when you get up from a bed (in Minecraft), there is a **1 in 100** chance of immediately dying.  
Why? Why not?
